name: io.github.hanabi-jpn/fx-trader-pro
description: Professional forex trading MCP server — OANDA API, 28 currency pairs, multi-timeframe technical analysis, risk management, and automated trade execution

environmentVariables.name: OANDA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OANDA v20 API token for authentication

environmentVariables.name: FX_RISK_PERCENT
environmentVariables.description: Risk per trade as percentage of equity (default: 2)

environmentVariables.name: FX_DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT
environmentVariables.description: Daily loss limit as percentage of NAV (default: 3)
